title: Emerald 2 Ruby
description: This texture pack replace emerald with ruby
body:
# Changes
Ruby now replaces emerald completely: emerald ore is now ruby, this also affected the deepslate variant, the emerald block is now a ruby block, the emerald villager's wallet and the zombie villager are now ruby, the eyes of the totem of undying are now also ruby.
## Items and Blocks
![Items and Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WpMtQSNW/images/56cad911d5d27cc14d384302b16a94aa8e9b5d5b.png)
## Villager and Zombie Villager
![Villager and Zombie Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WpMtQSNW/images/f98bf3a52c32ec6d078d19fa6b019cff5fe4ddcf.png)
## Ruby in Beacon
![Ruby in Beacon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WpMtQSNW/images/4889eae9628db2d61de225f06a8b8a0e1d49b457.png)

### Credit
Ruby texture made by Mojang
